name: Étirement cobra
reason: Cobra stretch extends the spine — targets lower back / erector spinae

name: High knee skips HD
reason: High knees = hip flexors + quads — not an abs exercise

name: Pont piétonnier
reason: Walking bridge = glute bridge variation — targets glutes

name: Vélo
reason: Cycling targets legs (quads) — not abs at all

name: W-raise
reason: W-raise is a scapular/rear delt exercise — targets shoulders/upper back

name: Dips sur banc au sol
reason: Bench dips target triceps — never biceps

name: Extension nuque
reason: Neck extension targets neck/upper traps — no biceps involvement

name: Maintien isométrique pull-up
reason: Pull-up hold = isometric lat contraction — primarily back

name: Muscle-up
reason: Muscle-up is a compound pull — primarily lats/back

name: Piliers hercules
reason: Iron cross / Hercules hold = chest + shoulders — not biceps

name: Pompes prise serrée
reason: Close-grip push-ups are a triceps exercise — pushing not pulling

name: Pull-back
reason: Pullback = pulling motion targeting lats/back

name: Rowing haltère sur banc incliné
reason: Chest-supported row = classic back exercise

name: Rowing inversé
reason: Inverted rows = horizontal pull primarily targeting back

name: Rowing mort supination haltère
reason: Dead row = back exercise (underhand grip adds bicep involvement but primary is back)

name: Traction front lever
reason: Front lever pull-up = advanced lat exercise

name: Tractions machine à écrire
reason: Typewriter pull-ups = horizontal lat pull variant

name: Wall slides
reason: Wall slides = shoulder mobility drill — zero biceps involvement

name: Ball slams
reason: Ball slams = overhead throwing — primarily shoulders and core

name: Câble assis à mi-piège haussement d'épaules
reason: Mid-trap shrug = shrugs target trapezius not lats

name: Élévation deltoïde postérieur assis
reason: Rear delt raise = shoulder exercise (posterior deltoid)

name: Élévation latérale poulie
reason: Lateral raises = textbook shoulder (lateral deltoid) exercise

name: Étirement extension épaule assis
reason: Shoulder stretch should be categorized with shoulders

name: L-sit
reason: L-sit = isometric hold targeting hip flexors and core

name: L-sit (pieds supportés)
reason: Same as L-sit — core/hip flexor exercise

name: Rotation russe
reason: Russian twist = classic oblique/core exercise — not back

name: Soulevé de terre roumain barre
reason: RDL primarily targets hamstrings — other RDL variants already classified as Ischios

name: Curl poignets barre
reason: Wrist curls target forearms — no shoulder involvement (Biceps is closest available group)

name: Rameur
reason: Rowing machine = horizontal pulling — primarily back

name: Shrugs barre
reason: Shrugs = the defining trapezius exercise

name: Shrugs sur multipress
reason: Shrugs = trapezius regardless of equipment

name: Tractions australiennes
reason: Inverted/Australian pull-ups = horizontal pull targeting back

name: Tractions commando
reason: Commando pull-ups = pull-up variant targeting back

name: Superman
reason: Superman targets erector spinae (lower back) — not glutes

name: Cordes de combat
reason: Battle ropes = arm/shoulder endurance — no hamstring involvement

name: Chaise au mur
reason: Wall sit = isometric quad hold — targets quadriceps

name: Squat barre
reason: Back squat = primarily quads — other squat variants already in Quadriceps

name: Squat complet barre
reason: Full squat = primarily quads (deeper ROM adds glute but primary is still quads)

name: Squat pistol
reason: Pistol squat = single-leg squat targeting quads

name: Pin squat
reason: Pin squat = squat variant with pause — targets quads

name: Smith machine split squat
reason: Split squat = lunge variant primarily targeting quads

name: Thruster haltères
reason: Thruster = squat-to-press compound — shoulders are the limiting factor

name: Stepper
reason: Stair stepper = cardio targeting quads/glutes — not hamstrings

name: Vélo couché
reason: Recumbent bike = cycling targeting quads — not hamstrings

name: Fente à une jambe avec kettlebell :
reason: Lunges target quads/glutes — zero calf involvement

name: Leg curl élastique
reason: Leg curls target hamstrings — not calves

name: Poussée latérale
reason: Lateral push-off = lateral plyometric targeting quads/glutes

name: Poussée traîneau
reason: Sled push = leg drive — primarily quads

name: Press fessier latéral unipodal
reason: It literally says 'glute press' in the name — targets glutes

name: Talons-fesses
reason: Butt kicks = dynamic hamstring curl — targets hamstrings

name: Épaulé puissance
reason: Power clean = Olympic lift — shoulders/legs/back — not chest at all

name: Essuie-glaces isométriques
reason: Isometric wipers = core rotation hold — abs exercise

name: Pompes pike
reason: Pike push-ups = overhead press substitute targeting shoulders

name: Gainage planche chat
reason: Cat plank = core stabilization exercise — not quads

name: Rotation du tronc
reason: It literally says 'Core' — core rotation is an abs exercise

name: Développé supination
reason: Supine press = bench press variant — targets chest

name: Extension triceps au-dessus
reason: Literally 'triceps extension' — classified under Trapèzes by mistake

name: Jeté force
reason: Push press = overhead press with leg drive — shoulders are the primary movers

name: Rotation interne allongé latéral
reason: Internal rotation = rotator cuff exercise — targets shoulders

name: Scaption haltères
reason: Scaption = shoulder raise in scapular plane — targets deltoids
